message:
data(beads,audit): sync issue tracker state and append audit index entries

- .beads/issues.jsonl: updated status and metadata for beads progressed
  during the packet curator promotion (3bsp5.4 closure, 3bsp5 parent
  takeover, Track-E/G dependency refresh)
- audit_index.jsonl: new audit trail entries capturing RESP parser
  pre-check verification, scheduler determinism analysis, cleanup
  coordinator atomicity review, and channel baton-pass protocol audit

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
